formParticipant.title: Subscribe
formParticipant.description1: Secure your spot at the biggest free software event.
formParticipant.description2: Registration is free - just sign up and be part of the community that builds, shares and believes in free software.
formParticipant.name: Name
formParticipant.federalCodeInvalid: Invalid Federal Code. Please check the digits.

formParticipant.institution: Where do you study or work?
formParticipant.course: What course are you taking or graduated from?
formParticipant.stateLabel: Which state do you live in?

formCollaborator.title: I want to collaborate
formCollaborator.description1: Do you want to help build this year's FLISoL?
formCollaborator.description2: We are organising the team of collaborators to plan the event, exchange ideas and divide the tasks that make everything happen.
formCollaborator.description3: Fill in the questionnaire below so we can start organising and schedule the first meetings.
formCollaborator.description4: Collaborators in the organising team receive a participation certificate for the organisation of the event.
formCollaborator.name: Name
formCollaborator.federalCodeInvalid: Invalid Federal Code. Please check the digits.
formCollaborator.distroLabel: Which GNU/Linux distribution do you use?
formCollaborator.institution: Where do you study or work?
formCollaborator.availabilityError: Select at least one availability slot.
formCollaborator.areasLabel: Where would you like to collaborate?
formCollaborator.areasError: Select at least one collaboration area.

areas.group4: Group 4 – Registration control (participants and speakers), certificates and activity tracking
areas.group5: Group 5 – Tech infrastructure (local network and wifi, servers and repositories)
areas.group6: Group 6 – Installation workshop (InstallFest) and media imaging
areas.group7: Group 7 – Programme (Other talks, Workshops and Short courses)
areas.group10: Group 10 – Outreach visits to other universities and schools
areas.group11: Group 11 – Filming, photography and event documentary
areas.group12: Group 12 – Graphic art and printed materials
areas.group13: Group 13 – Collaborative communication (real-time social media updates)

formSpeaker.title: Talk submission
formSpeaker.description1: Register for the biggest free software event.
formSpeaker.bulletMultipleSpeakers: multiple speakers for the same talk;
formSpeaker.bulletMultipleTalks: multiple talks for the same speaker or group of speakers.
formSpeaker.description4: In other words: if you have an idea, an experience or something interesting to share, this is the place. Send your proposal and be part of the event.
